milestoneTitle: Phase M9.17a.2 — Stronger overflow fix after phone review still showed bleed on 'Custom slash commands — the real leverage' and 'Blender + AI hybrid — the Young Carpets hero shot'. M9.17a.1's :has(+ .learn-menu) rule was correctly deployed but either browser-cached or not firing in Brave iOS. Switched to belt-and-suspenders: unconditional right gutter via padding: 12px 44px 12px 14px on .learn-item, plus overflow:hidden on both .learn-item and .learn-item-head so text physically cannot escape the card regardless of flex-shrink behavior. panel-tile box-shadow renders outside the element and is unaffected.
